name: popoutpick-site
description: PopOutPick website backend for serving the public site from a self-hosted machine.

scripts.check: node --check server.js && node --check admin/admin.js && node --check script.js && node --check homepage-text.js && node --check header-controls.js && node --check cart-badge.js && node --check site-config.js && node --check tools/preflight.js && node --check tools/browser-smoke.js && node --check tools/monitor.js && node --check tools/test-notification.js && node --check tools/test-file-notification.js && node --check tools/telegram-diagnose.js
